---
title: "Novelty Analysis"
subtitle: "Analysis of Novelty, Transience, and Resonance"
author: "PENPAL Project"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    theme: united
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# Load required packages
pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse,    # Data manipulation and plotting
  lme4,         # Mixed effects models
  lmerTest,     # P-values for mixed models
  arrow,        # Parquet file I/O
  stringi,      # String operations
  lubridate,    # Date/time handling
  zoo,          # Rolling statistics
  patchwork,    # Combine plots
  cowplot,      # Additional plot utilities
  afex,          # ANOVA
  here,          # File path management
  emmeans      # Estimated marginal means

)

# Set project root
PROJECT_ROOT <- here()
setwd(PROJECT_ROOT)

# Set global theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 14))

# Define output directories
GRAPHS_DIR <- file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "analysis", "figures")
TABLES_DIR <- file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "analysis", "tables")

# Create output directories if they don't exist
dir.create(GRAPHS_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(TABLES_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

# 1. Data Loading and Preprocessing

## 1.1 Load Data

```{r load-data}

# Load Field Data
df_res_field <- read_csv(here("data/TEXT/processed/novelty_scores.csv")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(user_surprise) & !is.na(ai_surprise)) %>%
  mutate(
    user_resonance = user_surprise - user_transience,
    ai_resonance = ai_surprise - ai_transience,
    datatype = "Field"
  ) %>%
  drop_na(user, ai) %>%
  filter(interaction_count > 1, interaction_count < 10)


```

## 1.2 Reshape Data

```{r reshape-data}
df_res_long <- df_res_field %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(user_surprise, user_transience, ai_surprise, ai_transience),
    names_to = c("agent", "metric"),
    names_pattern = "(user|ai)_(surprise|transience)"
  ) %>%
  
  pivot_wider(names_from = metric, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(
    resonance = surprise - transience,
    agent = factor(agent, levels = c("user", "ai"), labels = c("User", "AI"))
  )
```

## 1.3 Descriptive Statistics

```{r descriptive-stats}
desc_stats <- df_res_long %>%
  group_by(agent) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_surprise = mean(surprise, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_surprise = sd(surprise, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_transience = mean(transience, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_transience = sd(transience, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_resonance = mean(resonance, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_resonance = sd(resonance, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

knitr::kable(desc_stats, caption = "Descriptive Statistics for Novelty Metrics by Agent", digits = 3)
```

# 2. Novelty and Resonance Analysis

## 2.1 Resonance vs Novelty Plot

```{r resonance-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
# Plot Resonance vs Novelty (Field Data)
p_resonance <- ggplot(df_res_long, aes(x = surprise, y = resonance, color = agent)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, fullrange = TRUE, size = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("User" = "#377EB8", "AI" = "#FF7F00")) +
  labs(
    title = "Resonance vs Novelty (Field Data)",
    x = "Novelty (Surprisal)",
    y = "Resonance (Novelty - Transience)"
  ) +
  xlim(0,8) +
  ylim(-5,5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

print(p_resonance)

ggsave(file.path(GRAPHS_DIR, "novelty_resonance_vs_novelty.png"),
       p_resonance, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## 2.2 Transience vs Novelty Plot

```{r transience-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
p_transience <- ggplot(df_res_long, aes(x = surprise, y = transience, color = agent)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, fullrange = TRUE, size = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("User" = "#377EB8", "AI" = "#FF7F00")) +
  labs(
    title = "Transience vs Novelty (Field Data)",
    x = "Novelty (Surprisal)",
    y = "Transience"
  ) +
  xlim(0,8) +
  ylim(2,5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

print(p_transience)

ggsave(file.path(GRAPHS_DIR, "novelty_transience_vs_novelty.png"),
       p_transience, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

# 3. Statistical Models

## 3.1 Resonance Model

```{r resonance-model}

model_resonance <- lmer(resonance ~ surprise * agent + (1 | conversation_id), data = df_res_long)
cat("=== Resonance Model ===\n")
print(summary(model_resonance)$coefficients)

# Compare slopes
cat("\n=== Slope Comparison (Resonance) ===\n")
print(emtrends(model_resonance, specs = "agent", var = "surprise"))
```

## 3.2 Transience Model

```{r transience-model}
model_transience <- lmer(transience ~ surprise * agent + (1 | conversation_id), data = df_res_long)

cat("=== Transience Model ===\n")
print(summary(model_transience)$coefficients)

cat("\n=== Slope Comparison (Transience) ===\n")
print(emtrends(model_transience, specs = "agent", var = "surprise"))

```

# 4. Session Information

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Analysis complete.** All figures saved to `analysis/figures/` and tables to `analysis/tables/`.
